name: Zapier
description: Trigger workflows across 7,000+ apps via your Zaps

setupSteps.title: Open Zapier MCP dashboard
setupSteps.instructions: Sign in to Zapier and open the MCP page.

setupSteps.title: Create or pick an MCP server
setupSteps.instructions: Either create a new MCP server or select an existing one. Each server can expose a curated set of Actions (your Zaps).

setupSteps.title: Add Actions
setupSteps.instructions: Click Add Actions and pick which Zaps the AI should be allowed to trigger. Each Action becomes a callable tool.
setupSteps.gotcha: A server with zero Actions authenticates fine but exposes zero tools.

setupSteps.title: Copy the bearer token
setupSteps.instructions: In the server's settings, copy the Server URL's authentication token (looks like a UUID or similar).

setupSteps.title: Paste below + Save
setupSteps.instructions: Paste the token below and click Save.
